entries.title: deterministic emission + cache-stability baseline
entries.summary: - **Context-serving sorts carry total-order tiebreaks.** Six float-keyed sort sites (`get_ranked_context` exact-seed and scoring paths, `get_repo_map` file ranking, `signal_fusion.fuse`, `assemble_task_context` anchor and plate picks) resolved ties by list insertion order — which traces back to

entries.title: estimate-vs-actual consumption receipts
entries.summary: - **`plan_turn` prices its recommended route and the session grades the estimate.** Research on agent token spend keeps finding the same two facts: per-run consumption varies wildly, and agents systematically underestimate what a plan will cost to execute. jCodeMunch already held

entries.title: single-flight cold index loads and BM25 builds
entries.summary: - **Concurrent cold searches no longer repeat whole-index work (#370, reported by @rknighton).** Two thundering-herd defects, both visible at scale (a 665k-symbol, ~0.5 GB index took 7.5–11.4 minutes and ~16 GiB when 13 cold searches landed at once):
